message:
Optimize GF256 slice operations with array_chunks for better codegen

- gf256_add_slice: Replace chunks_exact_mut(8) with array_chunks_mut::<8>()
  for direct array access, eliminating try_into() overhead and bounds checks
- mul_with_table_wide: Use array_chunks_mut::<8>() and direct array assignment
  instead of copy_from_slice, enabling better SIMD vectorization
- addmul_with_table_wide: Same optimization pattern for multiply-add hot path
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
